item.title: Gemini 3 5 Flash Cyber
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

facts.statement: Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber is available exclusively to governments and trusted partners through a limited-access pilot program, and it powers the CodeMender agent for finding and fixing software vulnerabilities.
facts.effective_period: limited-access pilot program (ongoing as of announcement)
facts.value: exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via limited-access pilot
